basic_details.job_title: IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Associate Professor, Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Ranchi has announced a Special Recruitment Drive for SC/ST/NC-OBC/EWS/PWD category candidates for various faculty positions. This is an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates with strong academic and research credentials to join one of the premier management institutes in India. The last date to submit the online application is 29 July 2026 (5:00 PM). Find complete details including areas, pay scales, eligibility, and application process below.

qualification.details: Minimum Qualification: | Ph.D. or equivalent degree. Strong publication record in ABDC/ABS journals. Good academic background and understanding of current developments in the field. | Designation-wise Experience Requirements:

vacancy_details.details: Applications are invited in the following areas: Information Systems & Business Analytics Finance & Accounting Legal Studies & Responsible Business (Business Law) Note: The Institute reserves the right to fill or not to fill positions in any specialization.

how_to_apply: Visit the official careers page: https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers
Fill the online application form carefully (Advt. No. ADVT/IIMR/IPC-FR/SRD/2026/JUL).
Submit all required details and documents.
important_instructions: Incomplete applications will not be entertained. Mere fulfillment of qualifications does not guarantee a call for seminar/interview. Candidates in service should apply through proper channel and produce NOC at the time of interview. Reservation policy as per Government of India rules. Relaxation in qualification/experience may be considered for exceptionally bright candidates. The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per its criteria. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: IIM Ranchi invites applications from SC/ST/NC-OBC/EWS/PWD category candidates with exceptional academic background for the positions of Assistant Professor Grade-II, Assistant Professor Grade-I, Associate Professor, and Professor in the following areas through regular recruitment. Download IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_management_iim_ranch: Special Recruitment Drive for Reserved Categories
Assistant Professor Grade-II, Assistant Professor Grade-I, Associate Professor, Professor
Information Systems & Business Analytics, Finance & Accounting, Legal Studies & Responsible Business (Business Law)

rows.event: Last Date for Online Application Submission

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details & Areas
content_sections.text: Applications are invited in the following areas: Information Systems & Business Analytics Finance & Accounting Legal Studies & Responsible Business (Business Law) Note: The Institute reserves the right to fill or not to fill positions in any specialization.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ranchi Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent degree. Strong publication record in ABDC/ABS journals. Good academic background and understanding of current developments in the field. Designation-wise Experience Requirements:

rows.experience_requirement: 6 years (at least 3 years at Assistant Professor level)
10 years (at least 4 years at Associate Professor level)

content_sections.heading: Compensation & Benefits (7th CPC)
content_sections.text: Additional Benefits: LTC, medical reimbursement, EPF/NPS contribution. Faculty development allowance. Support for national/international conferences. Consultancy work with income sharing. Additional compensation for teaching/training (subject to work norms).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official careers page: https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers Fill the online application form carefully (Advt. No. ADVT/IIMR/IPC-FR/SRD/2026/JUL). Submit all required details and documents. Last date: 29 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Incomplete applications will not be entertained. Mere fulfillment of qualifications does not guarantee a call for seminar/interview. Candidates in service should apply through proper channel and produce NOC at the time of interview. Reservation policy as per Government of India rules. Relaxation in qualification/experience may be considered for exceptionally bright candidates. The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per its criteria. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 29 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. For which categories is the Special Recruitment Drive at IIM Ranchi open?
faq.answer: The drive is open for SC/ST/NC-OBC/EWS/PWD category candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What are the faculty positions available at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor Grade-II, Assistant Professor Grade-I, Associate Professor, and Professor.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Professor at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Pay scale is Rs. 1,59,100 – 2,20,200 with entry pay of Rs. 1,59,100.

faq.question: Q5. What are the areas of recruitment at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Information Systems & Business Analytics, Finance & Accounting, and Legal Studies & Responsible Business.

faq.question: Q6. Is PhD mandatory for IIM Ranchi Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Yes, Ph.D. or equivalent is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIM Ranchi Special Faculty Recruitment Drive?
faq.answer: Submit the online application at https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience required for Assistant Professor at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: For Grade II – No experience required; For Grade I – 3 years experience.

faq.question: Q9. Will reservation benefits apply in IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official advertisement for IIM Ranchi Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official website https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/ or the careers page.
